title: R8 sweep test trigger artifact-fidelity drift on spec 031

lockdownState.reason: bugfix-fastlane single-round closure under sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 8 (parent-expanded test-to-doc child mode)

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Design records Current Truth (objective research pass) with line-numbered file evidence, the three repair patches, and risks. Selected SCN-LST-004 extension over new SCN-LST-013 to avoid scenario-ID churn and preserve trace-guard mapping.
Scopes.md authored: one Scope 1 with three Gherkin scenarios, Implementation Plan, Shared Infrastructure Impact Sweep (artifact-only), Change Boundary, Test Plan (8 rows), DoD (11 items).

T-031-001: removed phantom function reference from SCN-LST-005 linkedTests via IDE tool. T-031-002: moved BUG-031-006 from activeBugs to resolvedBugs in parent state.json. T-031-003: extended SCN-LST-004 linkedTests with 3 SLA stress functions and added stress-test evidenceRef. Zero production source modified.

Audit scripts in bug.md Error Output preserved as one-off regression probes. Re-running each post-edit yields Findings:0 (T-031-001), reconciled bug lists (T-031-002), expected grep matches (T-031-003). RED captured pre-edit, GREEN captured post-edit.

go vet -tags=integration,stress + go build -tags=integration,stress across tests/integration/, tests/e2e/, tests/stress/, internal/api/: EXIT=0 on both. Zero production source modified preserves pre-BUG-031-007 GREEN state for the spec 031 broader E2E surface.

n/a with provenance: change manifest is artifact-edit only (3 lines in scenario-manifest.json and ~30 lines in parent state.json). No abstraction, helper, or wrapper surface introduced or removed; no simplification opportunity exists.

n/a with provenance: no flake fixture, no test infrastructure, no harness, no shared bootstrap touched. Existing spec 031 stabilize evidence (BUG-031-006 closure under R3) remains the canonical stabilize state for this spec; BUG-031-007 introduces no new stabilization surface.

n/a with provenance: artifact-only edits to two governance files inside specs/031-live-stack-testing/. No secrets, auth surface, network surface, or threat-model boundary touched. PII scan and gitleaks remain green via pre-commit hook.

n/a with provenance: docs/Testing.md and docs/Operations.md already document spec 031 live-stack patterns from prior closures; the BUG-031-007 closure adds no operator-facing surface, no new command, and no new failure mode.

n/a with provenance: artifact-only repair has no runtime surface to abuse-test. Existing spec 031 chaos coverage (live-stack readiness, ML SLA, ingestion smoke) is unaffected because zero production source modified.

artifact-lint.sh on parent spec 031: EXIT=0. artifact-lint.sh on BUG-031-007 packet: EXIT=0. git diff --cached --name-status shows only the 10 allowed change-boundary paths; spec 055 ntfy adapter WIP unstaged.

state-transition-guard.sh on parent spec 031: TRANSITION PERMITTED EXIT=0. state-transition-guard.sh on BUG-031-007 packet: TRANSITION PERMITTED EXIT=0. All 11 DoD items checked with concrete evidence; certification gate-results map all PASS.
